inputs.label: Average Cover Price (Menu Price)
inputs.businessContext: Average price paid per guest for a main dish or complete meal as listed on the menu.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average price paid per guest for a main dish or complete meal as listed on the menu.

inputs.label: Food Cost per Cover
inputs.businessContext: Direct ingredient cost allocated to each cover (plate cost).

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct ingredient cost allocated to each cover (plate cost).

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Cover
inputs.businessContext: Direct labor (kitchen + service) cost per guest.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct labor (kitchen + service) cost per guest.

inputs.label: Overhead per Cover
inputs.businessContext: Rent, utilities, insurance, and other fixed costs allocated per cover.

businessContext_i18n.en: Rent, utilities, insurance, and other fixed costs allocated per cover.

inputs.label: Food Waste Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of food purchased that is discarded due to spoilage, overproduction, or plate waste.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of food purchased that is discarded due to spoilage, overproduction, or plate waste.

inputs.label: Theft & Shrinkage Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Estimated loss of inventory due to theft, misreporting, or unrecorded consumption.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated loss of inventory due to theft, misreporting, or unrecorded consumption.

inputs.label: Discount & Comp Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of revenue lost due to employee meals, promotions, comps, and discounts.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of revenue lost due to employee meals, promotions, comps, and discounts.

inputs.label: Covers per Period (Monthly)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of guests served in the measurement period (month).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of guests served in the measurement period (month).

inputs.label: Menu Engineering Score (1-10)
inputs.businessContext: Subjective score of menu layout, item placement, and upselling effectiveness (1=poor, 10=excellent).

businessContext_i18n.en: Subjective score of menu layout, item placement, and upselling effectiveness (1=poor, 10=excellent).

inputs.label: Lean Kitchen Maturity Level
inputs.businessContext: Maturity of Lean/Six Sigma practices in kitchen operations (ISO 9001 / Lean principles).

businessContext_i18n.en: Maturity of Lean/Six Sigma practices in kitchen operations (ISO 9001 / Lean principles).

rules.message: Total direct costs exceed or equal the cover price. Margin is negative or zero.
Combined waste and theft exceeds 15% — critical operational leak.
Low lean maturity combined with high discounts indicates lack of process control.

thresholds.message: Net margin below 10% — investigate cost drivers.
Total leak per cover exceeds $2.00 — immediate action recommended.

formulas.name: Gross Margin per Cover
formulas.description: Revenue minus direct food cost per cover.

formulas.name: Contribution Margin per Cover
formulas.description: Gross margin minus labor and overhead.

formulas.name: Waste Leak per Cover
formulas.description: Monetary loss from food waste per cover.

formulas.name: Theft & Shrinkage Leak per Cover
formulas.description: Monetary loss from theft and shrinkage per cover.

formulas.name: Discount & Comp Leak per Cover
formulas.description: Revenue loss from discounts and comps per cover.

formulas.name: Total Leak per Cover
formulas.description: Sum of all hidden losses per cover.

primary.label: Net Margin Percentage
primary.description: Primary result: net margin as a percentage of cover price.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Food Waste
hiddenLossDrivers.impact: Direct reduction of gross margin through unused inventory.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Theft & Shrinkage
hiddenLossDrivers.impact: Unaccounted inventory loss erodes cost control.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Discounts & Comps
hiddenLossDrivers.impact: Revenue leakage from pricing and promotional policies.

suggestedActions.label: Implement Lean Kitchen Practices
suggestedActions.description: Adopt 5S, standardized work, and waste walk audits to reduce waste and improve flow.

suggestedActions.label: Strengthen Inventory Control
suggestedActions.description: Use perpetual inventory systems, cycle counting, and variance reporting to reduce theft.
suggestedActions.referenceStandard: WERC DC Metrics / COSO Internal Control

suggestedActions.label: Menu Re-engineering
suggestedActions.description: Analyze item profitability, reposition high-margin items, and reduce discount frequency.

suggestedActions.label: Enforce Portion Control
suggestedActions.description: Standardize recipes, use portion scales, and train staff to reduce waste and cost variability.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Adjusted Net Margin
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Net margin adjusted by a confidence factor based on input reliability (e.g., waste and theft estimates).
